segments.text: The third doesn't connect, back to neutral!
segments.original_text: 3番目が当たらず展開がニュートラルへ

segments.text: Rizeasu can't open anything up with the chain grab!

full_text: The third doesn't connect, back to neutral! Rizeasu can't open anything up with the chain grab! Here we go!
